items.headline: MiSTer Companion v3.5.1 Released
items.message:
MiSTer Companion v3.5.1 is now available.

This release includes the changes from v3.5.0, adding official RetroAccount support to the Update All configurator for premium update_all features, with special thanks to theypsilon for the support and guidance.

MiSTer Pico-8 was also added to the Extras tab, allowing you to install or uninstall it directly from MiSTer Companion.

v3.5.1 then follows up with a fix for MiSTer Pico-8 support to match recent changes in the GitHub release layout, including migration support for older v1.1 installs.

You can download the latest stable release below.

items.headline: Help Bring MiSTer Companion to macOS
items.message:
macOS support is now being actively worked on, with recent improvements contributed by DoggyChicken.

To continue improving and properly maintain macOS support long-term, having access to a Mac for development and testing is still essential. At the moment, I rely on community contributions and am unable to test macOS-specific changes directly.

If you'd like to help make this possible, consider supporting the Ko-fi goal below.
